stripped_llm_application: An equivariant LLM block that operates on the quotient space M/G of the representation under a symmetry group G; a cocycle constraint enforces phase coherence across orbits; orbit-coherent loss term added.
novelty_claim_stripped: Existing equivariant networks (E(3)NN, EGNN) use representation theory directly. The candidate adds explicit cocycle/phase tracking on the orbifold quotient.
